message:
chore(e2e): regenerate test fixtures with updated encryption keys

E2E test fixtures have been regenerated with fresh encryption keys
and timestamps. These fixtures support the secure encrypted archive
export functionality tests.

Changes include:
- Updated master keys and integrity fingerprints
- Refreshed config.json timestamps
- Regenerated encrypted payload chunks
- Updated export database state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
